CONTENT.Club career: Kwateng is a youth prospect of Nantes and eventually made his Ligue 1 first-team debut on 15 August 2015 against Angers in a 0–0 draw replacing Olivier Veigneau after 79 minutes.In June 2019, Kwateng agreed a four-year deal with league rivals Bordeaux. Due to the expiration of his Nantes contract he joined Bordeaux on a free transfer for the 2019–20 season.On 14 February 2023, he signed a 1,5-year contract with Süper Lig club Ankaragücü.
CONTENT.External links: Enock Kwateng at the French Football Federation (in French)Enock Kwateng at the French Football Federation (archived) (in French)
CONTENT.International career: Of Ghanaian descent, Kwateng has represented France at U16, U17, U18, U19, and U20 levels

SUMMARY: Enock Kwateng (born 9 April 1997) is a French professional footballer who plays as a right-back. He is France youth international, having represented the country from U16 to U20 levels.
